3071890.name: Whispers In The Woods
3071890.description: Ellie wakes up lost in a dense, fog-covered forest with no memory of how they got there. She must navigate through the forest to find a way out, all while being pursued by an unseen force that stalks her in the shadows. The deeper she go, the more unsettling the environment becomes, and the player uncovers disturbing clues about the forest’s cursed history.
3071890.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
